<Badge text="huggingface-skills-all" variant="note" /> <Badge text="16 words" variant="default" /> <Badge text="Avoid default" variant="danger" /> <Badge text="global-only-or-avoid" variant="default" />

> keep global unless ML workflows become frequent.

<div class="quick-start">

### Quick Start

**Install:**
```bash
npx skills add huggingface/skills --skill huggingface-skills-all -y -g
```

**Use:** `/huggingface-skills-all`

</div>

Works with [Claude Code](https://docs.anthropic.com/en/docs/claude-code), [Gemini CLI](https://github.com/google-gemini/gemini-cli), [OpenCode](https://github.com/anomalyco/opencode), and other [agentskills.io](https://agentskills.io)-compatible agents.

 Legacy projection `config/external-skills.md` remains dual-read during migration.
</Aside>

## Harness Coverage

Targets all supported agent harnesses via the install command below.

**Portable multi-harness install command:**
```bash
npx skills add huggingface/skills --skill huggingface-skills-all -y -g
```

## Trust / Audit

Trust tier: **Avoid default** (`global-only-or-avoid`)

Curated status: `global-only-or-avoid`

Risk notes: keep global unless ML workflows become frequent.

Entry maintained in `config/external-skills.md`; provenance and audit notes are authoritative there (research context is advisory).

## Purpose

Curated from huggingface/skills; keep global unless ML workflows become frequent. Provides access to numerous Hugging Face related agent skills.

status=global-only-or-avoid; selector=unresolved; unresolved: keep global unless ML workflows become frequent.
